release_notes: v1.3.0 Agent runtime model role polish and streaming responses
Agent role inference: coding-agent → coding, brand-strategist → planning, etc.
Agent run output shows model role, provider/model, fallback, discussion mode
CLI --stream enables streaming for chat, text generate, and agent runs
Streaming provider interface: stream_text() with token/metadata/error/done chunks
Streaming fallback to generate_text for non-streaming providers
Chat UI: Streaming toggle, progressive token display, stop button
Chat UI: Discussion Mode + Streaming shows warning and falls back to non-streaming
Safety: no secrets logged during streaming, sensitive prompt redaction
Automation model_role saved and displayed in creation preview
